items.title: Active exploitation of CVE-2024-3400 in PAN-OS GlobalProtect
items.review: Multiple vendors report in-the-wild exploitation of CVE-2024-3400, a command-injection flaw in the GlobalProtect feature of PAN-OS. Activity is attributed to a state-aligned cluster tracked as UTA-0218. Technique T1190 (Exploit Public-Facing Application) is used for initial access.

items.title: APT29 phishing campaign abuses cloud app consent
items.content: Researchers describe an APT29 (Cozy Bear) campaign using OAuth consent phishing for persistence (T1098.003) and collection. Indicators include several look-alike domains.

items.title: LockBit affiliate activity rises against manufacturing
items.summary: A weekly OSINT roundup notes increased LockBit ransomware activity (T1486 Data Encrypted for Impact) targeting manufacturers, alongside FIN7-linked loaders.
